credentials.title: Sign in with credentials
credentials.description: Enter the URL of your Glutz eAccess instance and your credentials.

invitation.title: Use an invitation link
invitation.description: Paste the invitation link you received by email.

invitation_confirm.title: Set your password
invitation_confirm.description: Review the host and email, then choose a password with at least 8 characters including uppercase, lowercase, a digit and a special character.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Glutz server. Check the host URL and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your username and password.
error.invalid_invitation: The invitation link is not valid. Make sure you pasted the full URL from the email.
error.invalid_password: Password must be at least 8 characters and include uppercase, lowercase, a digit and a special character.

abort.already_configured: This Glutz instance is already configured.
